name: Getting Started docs (/docs/getting-started)
description: Public Getting Started guide. Adoption-sweep port of docs-hub.spec.ts 'Getting Started (/docs/getting-started)' describe block (structural half: main heading, 'What You'll Learn' section, the 3-step Build/Test/Run workflow, Next Steps). 'loads without 500' is covered by the C8 crawl + run-level HTTP-500 invariant; this spec adds the structural element-presence assertions. Element ids captured from a ci-bot CI element-dump: heading-1-getting-started is the H1; the 'What You'll Learn' and the three step H2s (Build / Test / Run) and 'Next Steps' are stable anchors. Public page. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Getting Started header
states.description: Page H1 + the 'What You'll Learn' H2. Ports docs-hub.spec.ts:169/194.

states.name: 3-step workflow
states.description: The Next Steps H2 (stable end-of-page anchor). Ports docs-hub.spec.ts:209/267 (3-step workflow + Next Steps section).
